issues.sample: SAFETY ISSUE - 2016 EGOLF WOULD NOT MOVE AFTER A ROUTINE TRAFFIC STOP WITH "MAIN CHARGING FAILED" ERROR. DURING A NORMAL COMMUTE AFTER 3, 4 MILES OF DRIVING 30 - 40 MPH, CAR WOULDN'T MOVE AFTER A ROUTINE TRAFFIC STOP RIGHT AFTER A TRAFFIC LIGHT. THIS IS EVENING 6PM RUSH HOUR TRAF

narrative.headline: What 2016 Volkswagen Golf owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 85 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (34% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
